name: Launch Labs Golf
address: 775 Cochrane Rd Ste 160, Morgan Hill, CA 95037
about: Launch Labs Golf is a members-only indoor golf facility in Morgan Hill, featuring three Trackman iO simulator bays. The facility provides 24/7 access for members to practice, play world-renowned courses like Pebble Beach and St. Andrews, or compete. All bookings are made online through a smart booking system, and the venue operates without on-site staff to ensure a distraction-free environment, with orientation and support available as needed.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access to premium Trackman iO technology with real-time swing data
Exclusive access to world-class golf courses like Pebble Beach and St. Andrews
Large, immersive hitting bays with premium amenities including complimentary espresso and snacks
Smart online booking system for hassle-free bay reservations
Private, distraction-free environment with no on-site staff during play

food_and_drink.notes: Members and guests can bring their own food encouraged from neighboring Madrone Village restaurants; complimentary snacks available for members
BYOB allowed; members encouraged to purchase from neighboring Madrone Village establishments

simulator_hardware.notes: Three bays with industry-leading technology using radar, infrared, and high-speed imaging for real-time swing data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Launch Labs Golf highly recommends bringing your own set of golf clubs. Rental clubs are available for an additional cost, subject to availability.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Yes! The facility is located within Madrone Village, and members are encouraged to bring food and drink from neighboring establishments. Complimentary espresso, snacks, and bottled water are also available for members.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Website content does not specify the time required to complete 18 holes.

faq.question: Is Launch Labs Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility can accommodate kids. Each bay fits up to 4 people, and the venue is suitable for families and various experience levels including beginners.
